description_long: This house is a large, modern residential complex surrounded by a dense perimeter of trees, creating a private and enclosed environment. The structure consists of multiple interconnected rectangular buildings with flat roofs, arranged around central courtyards and open spaces. The exterior is predominantly white and gray, with some black accents, and features a mix of solid walls and large window openings. There are several entry points, including a prominent driveway leading to the main entrance, and a visible gate structure on one side. The landscaping is minimal within the enclosure, focusing on the geometric layout of the buildings and the surrounding greenery. The overall design emphasizes privacy, modularity, and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A large, modern house complex with flat roofs, white and gray exteriors, and surrounded by dense trees. The layout is modular and enclosed, with multiple interconnected buildings and central courtyards.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house complex from above, highlighting the dense tree perimeter and the modular arrangement of the buildings within the enclosure.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a clear look at the main driveway and entrance, as well as the geometric layout of the buildings and open courtyards.
description_view_2: View 2 emphasizes the rear side of the complex, showing the continuation of the tree barrier and the interconnected structures.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective of the house from the opposite side, revealing additional entry points and the overall symmetry of the layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide driveway, flat overhang, and minimalistic door with no visible porch or columns.
